payload.author: agent
payload.body: Merged PR #3; released v0.2.2 — all 10 crates at 0.2.2 on crates.io, GitHub release created. Dashboard issues (imprecise anyhow/syn, outdated toml/thiserror/ariadne, missing READMEs) all addressed. The 3 'internal error' entries were transient lib.rs-side and should resolve on its next check.
